data_out.description: Loaded 450K dataset object with pre-filter probe count of 485,512 probes
Loaded EPIC dataset object with pre-filter probe count of 867,531 probes

domain_knowledge: The HumanMethylation450 (450K) array interrogates 485,512 probes targeting CpG sites across the human genome, distributed across autosomes and sex chromosomes.
The EPIC array interrogates 867,531 probes, representing an expansion over the 450K platform with additional coverage of regulatory regions.
ChAMP's champ.load() function accepts either .idat files or beta-value matrices and performs initial data import with automatic detection of array type.
Pre-filter probe counts reflect the full probe content of each array platform before any filtering or quality-control steps are applied.

script_runs: execute champ.load() or champ.import() on HumanMethylation450 test dataset without errors
script_runs: execute champ.load() or champ.import() on EPICSimData test dataset without errors
value_in_range: probe count returned from HumanMethylation450 pre-filter equals 485,512 (exact match required)
value_in_range: probe count returned from EPICSimData pre-filter equals 867,531 (exact match required)
expert_review: Verify that the test datasets (HumanMethylation450 and EPICSimData) are legitimate reference datasets appropriate for validating ChAMP loading functionality
Confirm that pre-filter probe counts reported in documentation or package vignette match the expected values of 485,512 for 450K and 867,531 for EPIC

cmd: import champ; obj_450k = champ.load(dataset='{inputs.dataset_450k}'); print(f'450K pre-filter probes: {obj_450k.shape[0]}'); assert obj_450k.shape[0] == 485512, f'Expected 485512 but got {obj_450k.shape[0]}'; obj_epic = champ.load(dataset='{inputs.dataset_epic}'); print(f'EPIC pre-filter probes: {obj_epic.shape[0]}'); assert obj_epic.shape[0] == 867531, f'Expected 867531 but got {obj_epic.shape[0]}'; print('All validations passed')
